protocol_name: Q5 Hot Start High-Fidelity 2X Master Mix
notes: Vendor guide gives annealing as calculator-dependent (50-72C) and extension 20-30 s/kb; modeled common routine sub-1 kb run with 60C/20 s anneal, 30 s extension, 30 cycles.

protocol_name: Platinum II Hot-Start PCR Master Mix (2X)
notes: Modeled from vendor defaults: annealing 60C for most primer pairs, polymerase extends 1 kb in 15 s, hot-start restored after 94C initial denaturation. Final extension modeled at 5 min.
Vendor protocol gives annealing 55-68C and 30-35 cycles; modeled common mid-range 60C, 30 cycles, 2 min extension for 0.2-2 kb fragments.
